column1: 資料はコピーしても差し支えありません。
column2: しりょうはこぴーしてもさしつかえありません。
column3: There is no problem with copying the materials.
column4: ても差し支えない (may ~, is it okay if ~, there is no problem with ~ing)
column5: Verb[て] + も差し支えない
column6: formal polite expression granting permission; 'there is no obstacle to ~ing'
column8: ても差し支えない = formal permission granted; てもいい = okay to (general); てかまわない = doesn't matter (more casual); ても問題ない = no problem if
